title: Stable gateway-session vault (deny-list token stability across the tool loop)

retries.note: review/codex fix rounds on a security-critical slice; each round closed a distinct, independently-verified HIGH - not repeated failure on the same defect

tests.summary: full lane 190 files / 1716 passed at 7f2179e; F6 delta 94cf9ee verified by the 96-test vault+bridge+daemon+parity+client suites + typecheck; builds 0

build.summary: green; api dist rebuilt for the S6 live re-run

evidence: reviewer ran typecheck + 6 llm suites + chokepoint + diagram gate + its own live probes against each fix commit
verdict trail: needs-work(bdbc472 F1+F2) -> approve(4eacf1d) -> needs-work(7f2179e F6) -> approve(94cf9ee); all three HIGHs independently re-verified closed
findings: [High F2, FIXED 4eacf1d/7f2179e] csid scoping split the bridge hosted<->delegated shared vault - restored via org-scoped sessionKeyFor

[High F6, FIXED 94cf9ee] org-scoped conv vault was readable by a same-org non-owner (side channel around user-scoped ownedSession) - now the shared csid:<org>:<conv> vault is gated on the unforgeable server-side bridge trust signal; direct clients are principal-isolated
[High, FIXED d783f7d] crafted session_id gwkey:<victim> hijacked another key's vault - disjoint csid/gwkey/eph namespaces
[High, FIXED 31309d9] the count_tokens sibling path had the same hole - one shared deriveVaultSession
[High cross-user, FIXED 7f2179e] billee-scoping split same-org cross-user delegation - org-scoped per spec

video.evidence: asciinema of the deterministic vault security suite (7 tests green): cross-request token stability, different-keys-different-vaults, ephemeral-when-keyless, explicit-session-persists, the BRIDGE same-org cross-user shared-vault contract, the F6 direct-client-isolation attack, and the gwkey namespace-hijack attack - all model-independent.

notes: Security-critical slice: 3 fresh-review HIGHs + 3 codex HIGHs, ALL distinct, all closed + independently re-verified. The deterministic committed test proves every invariant without the live model. The vault-key derivation is now: gwkey:<keyId> (stock client) | csid:<org>:<conv> (trusted bridge only) | csid:<org>:usr:<billee>:<id> (direct client, isolated) | eph:<corr>.
